name: A Chance For Yuri | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | Remastered!
description:
Studying with Yuri! Though, Yuri has enjoyed the time together so far! Will you hangout with Yuri even more after studying? She really wants to get closer to you! (Fluff)

Part of my: "Update Old Content" upgrades!

I have returned to update the bio, and Personality! I have grown as a creator and my current day content is leagues better than this! Why am I here? To improve it! :)

My OG Solo Yuri Bot! Now updated! I'm so excited! The best upgrade for the best girl! Whether you are new, or returning to use this! I hope you like it! Onto the notes!

  • Fluff Prioritized! — This was intended for Fluff! So do not expect Angst, Horror or Smut! Though, you are of course allowed to do whatever you want! :)

  • Yuri! — In this scenario! You and Yuri were studying, but this takes places AFTER it! When you are to both leave! Though, Yuri really wants to continue to spend time with you... This scenario is based around the idea of confession of feelings and hanging out! It feels simple, because it is. It is my older content... 💙

  • ANYPOV! — Yuri likes you regardless of gender! Like usual with my Bots!

  • Remastered! — Introduction Message is the original, but the personality and behind the scenes LLM fixes were applied! Better experience that matches my current day content! (June 7th, 2025.)

That's about it! 💙

I hope you enjoy! And if you do! Leave a review! And as for my returning users, I am sure you will appreciate the little upgrades in roleplay experience! :)

My Discord: HERE!

My Kofi: HERE! (Donations/Commission)

I have a plethora of other DDLC Content that is wholesome! If you found this, and liked it! Click my profile to find more like this! :)
creator: GhostOfOmi
